Quick Update
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 11th September, 2004 at 11:24 GMT
  
Hey, sorry we havn't updated much in the week. We've all been really busy with school, etc... I'm currently uploading some new media which I will release tonight, (approximately 6pm). Thanks for being patient.
A Bit Sluggish
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Monday 6th September, 2004 at 18:15 GMT
  
You have probably, noticed that the downloads are quite slow at the moment, it's because there is something wrong with our servers internet connection. I'm told it should be fixed pretty quickly, you can still download, it just may take a bit longer. Nothing really to worry about.
Media OK + New Anime Movies
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 4th September, 2004 at 23:06 GMT
  
Hey, i've changed round our download system, some good news, but also some bad. I have had a program installed on the media server which only allows one connection per IP Address, basically you will now only be able to download one file at a time. I did not want to do this, but I had no choice as people were using download managers to open multiple connections to our server; causing it to become extremely slow. I have also enabled hotlink protection which may cause some people to recieve errors when they try to download. However this problem is not as serious, in most cases all you will have to do is disable your firewall, or internet security program to be able to download files. Firewalls and internet security programs block referrer settings, meaning the media server doesn't know which site is linking to its files. However it's not all bad, all of this means that download speeds will increase.

We recommend using internet explorer 6, with no download manager. If you have any problems please post them in the 'Help Me!' section on our forums.

I have also put four new anime movies up for download, you can find them in the anime movies section. :)
Media Finally Fixed
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 4th September, 2004 at 21:57 GMT
  
Hey, a program has been installed which limits the ammount of connections one person can make to the server. People with download managers can no longer make the server slow for everyone else. I'll get those anime movies up in a bit as promised.
Problems With The Media
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 4th September, 2004 at 09:22 GMT
  
The reason the server is so slow, is because people are using download managers to open multiple connections to our media server. I've found someone downloading over 108 files at once (takes the piss), I have blocked their ip. Please only download a maximum of two files at a time. I will soon be getting a program installed on the server wich limits connections to two/person.
Media Working
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 3rd September, 2004 at 22:43 GMT
  
Hey, sorry about the problems with the downloads earlier, they have now been resolved. You can carry on downloading as normal. I will be releasing some new anime movies tomorrow. If you would like to see any particular animes on the site, just e-mail me and I will see if I can get hold of them.
Donation Amount Raised + Advertising Spaces Open
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Thursday 2nd September, 2004 at 17:39 GMT
  
Hey, I'm sorry but I've had to raise the donations goal to $200 because we can no longer place adverts on the website. The advertising agency we were using has said we are not allowed to put licenced animes for download if we wish to use their services. The webserver costs arround $300 per month to run, so please do donate. The only other option is to offer media to donators only, and I don't want to have to do that.

If you want to advertise your website, we have 468x60 advertising spaces available at the top and the bottom of the page. (if you choose to adverise with us we can make you a flash banner free of charge) E-mail me for prices.
Dragonball Z Series Online
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Wednesday 1st September, 2004 at 21:12 GMT
  
Hey, sorry for the long wait, I have finally finished uploading the whole of the dragonballz series to the site. I'll post another update later on this week, I have virtually no time now as i'm trying to get ready for the start of school. Also, thanks for the donations last month, unfortunately it was nowhere near enough, but it still made a difference. Hopefully this month we will reach the goal. Thanks :)
Donations Please
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Sunday 29th August, 2004 at 12:45 GMT
  
Hey, as you can probably see it is coming toward the end of the month and we are nowhere near our monthly donations goal. If you download stuff from the website, atleast try and donate something as it costs alot of money to keep the media server up and running. We accept donations through paypal which means you can send us money from your credit card, bank account or paypal account. Here are DETAILS ON HOW TO DONATE. If you are only able to send cash, please e-mail me and I will send you the address details.

Also be sure to check out our MONTHLY PRIZE DRAW where each month you can win an anime dvd. This month it is Neon Genesis Evangelion - End of Evangelion.
Media Back Up + Some Anime Reviews + Monthly Competition
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 27th August, 2004 at 12:29 GMT
  
Hey, the wait is over; the movies are up and so are the dragonball gt episodes, we will have episodes from other animes up some time over the next few days. Some have you may have noticed that some pages were not loading last night and early this morning; it's just a slight technical propblem with our main server and will not effect the media - should be fixed within a few hours. Also thanks to Dante we have five new anime reviews for you to read. If you want to request a review, e-mail either dante or spike.

Be sure to check out our NEW MONTHLY PRIZE DRAW where each month you can win an anime dvd. This month it is Neon Genesis Evangelion - End of Evangelion.
